arts.ttl: Tottenham legend delivers Ange Postecoglou sack verdict as Daniel Levy sent firm message
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou must be given more time to work on his Tottenham Hotspur project, and chairman Daniel Levy cannot keep changing managers, Kasey Keller tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Man City boss Pep Guardiola's 'stance' on Man United's Marcus Rashford 'revealed' amid transfer talk
arts.sum: Manchester City head coach Pep Guardiola is reportedly 'a big fan' of Manchester United's Marcus Rashford, with a move to the Etihad Stadium not being ruled out.

arts.ttl: Man Utd respond to Alejandro Garnacho claims amid investigation into team news leaks
arts.sum: Team news has been getting leaked ahead of Manchester United games and the club have now responded to suggestions that winger Alejandro Garnacho is responsible for the leaks

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid Want to Sign 'Unstoppable' Man Utd Star
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid are reportedly showing interest in Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho ahead of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Spurs vs Man United, Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou spoke to the media at Hotspur Way on Wednesday, ahead of our Carabao Cup quarter-final against Manchester United at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Thursday night (8pm UK). Like I said, good game, big opponent and they have done well in cup competitions in the last couple of years.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford is left OUT of Man United's League Cup squad to face Tottenham after bombshell admission he's ready to leave Old Trafford... as Alejandro Garnacho returns to Ruben Amorim's side
arts.sum: Manchester United wantaway Marcus Rashford has been omitted from Ruben Amorim's squad to face Tottenham on Thursday night, while Alejandro Garnacho returns.

arts.ttl: 'Step up': Jamie O'Hara suggests Tottenham should sign 'unbelievable' player who's way better than Timo Werner
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur might need a big January transfer window in order to get their season back on track. The north London club have been incredibly...

arts.ttl: What a Marcus Rashford transfer exit might mean for Manchester United and PSR
arts.sum: Speculation around Marcus Rashford and his future remains at fever pitch after the Man United forward revealed he's ready to leave Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Is Man Utd keeper Onana part of problem or solution for Amorim?
arts.sum: Andre Onana was in the spotlight after another mistake in the Europa League - but is he a key player for Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim?

arts.ttl: 'Marcus Rashford will look back and think 's***' - he'll struggle to believe what's happened'
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker Dwight Yorke is shocked by Marcus Rashford's decline - when the striker should be at the peak of his powers
